reason: Verify global architecture, RVV-first authority chain, and support-level/evidence separation after changes.
Verify selected-body owner/provider/artifact boundary compliance, fail-closed diagnostics, and no selected-body API leakage into route planning headers.
Verify ABI/runtime role handling stays in tcrv.exec envelope and is explicitly consumed by typed tcrv_rvv bodies.
Verify provider-built TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute and common EmitC neutrality, with mirrors remaining non-authoritative.
Verify focused plugin, lit, generated-bundle, authority-scan, and check-tianchenrv evidence are appropriate for the changed surface.
